audio_models.name: Kokoro TTS
audio_models.description: Lightweight, fast, high-quality TTS model. 54M parameters. Supports English and multilingual voices. Best balance of speed and quality for local use.

audio_models.name: XTTS-v2
audio_models.description: Coqui XTTS-v2 — powerful multilingual TTS with voice cloning. Supports 17 languages and custom voice references. Best for expressive, high-quality voice output.

audio_models.name: Whisper (faster-whisper)
audio_models.description: OpenAI Whisper via faster-whisper — accurate multilingual speech-to-text. Available in tiny/base/small/medium/large. Best local STT model.
